message:
fix(writing + rss): filter draft highlights out of /writing index and RSS feed

Follow-up to the home-page draft filter: `/writing` and `/rss.xml`
were still iterating over `writingHighlights` without checking
`item.draft`, so any article flagged `draft: true` would show up on
the writing index and in the RSS feed even after being filtered off
the home page.

Apply the same `.filter((item) => !item.draft)` guard at both call
sites so every public surface — home feature strip, /writing index,
/rss.xml feed — consistently hides drafts.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
